name: phase-gate
description: Phase-gated task execution adapted from CORE framework. Every agent task must pass through PLANâ†’EXECUTEâ†’VERIFYâ†’DELIVER gates.

capabilities.plan_phase: Agent declares intent, tool requirements, expected outputs
capabilities.execute_phase: Sandboxed execution with tool allowlist enforcement
capabilities.verify_phase: Deterministic verification â€” Z3 proofs, governance check, test pass
capabilities.deliver_phase: Output validated, persisted to JSONL, attestation generated
capabilities.gate_blocking: Cannot advance to next phase without current phase passing

rules: No agent skips phases â€” PLANâ†’EXECUTEâ†’VERIFYâ†’DELIVER is mandatory
VERIFY phase uses deterministic checks only (no LLM judgment)
Failed VERIFY triggers RETRY (max 3) then ESCALATE to organizer-os
Each phase transition logged with timestamp and proof hash
Open SWE pattern: isolated execution environment per task
